steps.title: Use slope and intercept signs
steps.content: The graph has a positive $y$-intercept of $1.5$ and a negative slope. Since $R$ is positive, rewrite the matching equation to check those features.

steps.title: Rewrite the matching form
steps.content: Solve $Rx+12y=18$ for $y$: $$12y=-Rx+18$$ $$y=-\frac{R}{12}x+\frac{18}{12}$$ $$y=-\frac{R}{12}x+1.5$$ Because $R>0$, this has negative slope and positive $y$-intercept. The answer is A.
